positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a vibrant, tropical forest scene viewed through a magnifying glass. The centerpiece is a cluster of stylized exotic leaves (Monstera, fern, ginger) rendered in deep emerald greens, teal, and pops of neon coral. Interwoven among the leaves are subtle, abstract geometric patterns mimicking insect wings and stained glass mandalas. Composition should feature strong, overlapping silhouettes and high contrast between the dark jungle foliage and the brightly illuminated, abstract patterned areas. Style must be high-detail graphic art, combining elements of Art Nouveau linework and modern vector graphic design. Cinematic, flat lighting, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Center composition, isolated on a clean white background.
negative: blurry, low resolution, poor anatomy, extra limbs, text, watermark, signature, messy, cartoonish, amateur drawing, noisy, grayscale, bad contrast
